data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures optimal viewing experience across a wide range of devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS media queries and flexible grid-based layouts.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposes applications into a series of loosely coupled services.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using RESTful APIs with Docker for containerization.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Supports a scalable and flexible computing environment.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging AWS services for hosting and resource scaling.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA)
data.description: Enhances user experience by loading content dynamically.
data.technical_spec: Built with frameworks like React or Angular to manage state and routing.

data.title: Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD)
data.technical_spec: Incorporates tools like Jenkins or GitLab CI for automated testing and deployment.
